CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, content String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'CaseInsensitiveTesting'), (2, 'ClickHouseIsGreat'), (3, 'heLLoWorLD'), (4, 'another test case'), (5, 'CAsE');
SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(content, ['test', 'CAsE']) AS positions FROM test_strings WHERE positions[1] != 0;
CREATE TABLE string_data (group_id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO string_data VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse'), (2, 'clickhouse IS AWESOME'), (3, 'This is a test'), (4, 'Search clicks HERE');
SELECT a.group_id, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(a.text, ['search', 'is']), b.text FROM string_data a JOIN string_data b ON a.group_id = b.group_id WHERE b.text LIKE '%test%';
SELECT group_id, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text, ['click', 'HERE']) FROM string_data WHERE group_id IN (SELECT group_id FROM string_data WHERE text LIKE '%awesome%');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(content, ['all', 'positions']) FROM test_strings GROUP BY content HAVING count > 0;
INSERT INTO search_test VALUES ('Search here'), ('Another EXAMPLE'), ('case Check'), ('no match here');
